# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving and real-time guidance as users tackle a challenge with the Azure OpenAI integration.

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style challenges with an AI assistant to guide you through solving problems in real-time, showcasing problem-solving flow from prompt to solution.
- CTA: Try a practice problem with AI help now
- Visual brief: A short demo style video: split-screen showing the CodeGrind editor on one side with a LeetCode-style problem prompt, and the AI assistant panel providing hints and code suggestions; subtle cyberpunk UI touches and real-time code updates.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
